test_suite.details: node test.js: 3692 passed, 0 failed. All internal anchors, showTab() calls, tab structure, data cross-references, sections.json schema, prediction panels, and PROP-041 smoke checks pass.

internal_anchors.details: Delegated to test.js (Section 3: Internal Links). All href='#...' targets and showTab() calls verified by test suite.

tab_structure.details: Test suite validates tab structure, heading hierarchy, and sectionNav chain. All pass.

external_links.details: 17/18 data-source URLs resolved OK. www.chime-frb.ca returned HTTP 500 on both attempts. All major data sources (NOAA, NCEI, ESA Swarm, GRACE-FO, Gaia, INTERMAGNET, eclipse.gsfc.nasa.gov, GitHub) are reachable. DOI/publisher links skipped per protocol.

data_prose_consistency.details: WIN count 72 matches wins.json length. Verdict tallies: Refuted by Data=12, Self-Contradicted=20, Misleading=16, Std Model Explains=18, Not Demonstrated=3, Unfalsifiable=3. Covered by test.js Section 5 (Data Cross-References).

win_detail_consistency.details: All 72 WIN detail popups present, summary table rows correct, verdict color classes consistent. Covered by test.js.

progressive_disclosure.details: Phase A Design Refresh check (test.js Section 9) passes. No empty TLDRs detected.

hardcoded_theme_colors.details: Zero hardcoded light-theme color values (#fff, #f8f9fa, etc.) found in sections.json inline styles. Dark theme integrity maintained.

discoverability_infrastructure.llms_txt: exists, contains review URL, WIN count 72 matches
discoverability_infrastructure.sitemap_xml: exists, valid, contains main URL + llms.txt
discoverability_infrastructure.robots_txt: exists, has Allow:/ and Sitemap: directive
discoverability_infrastructure.uncounted_failures: exists, 18 entries, no schema errors, no duplicate IDs
discoverability_infrastructure.meta_tags: description, og:title, og:description, ClaimReview JSON-LD all present
discoverability_infrastructure.details: All discoverability infrastructure is intact and current.

expansion_tracker_continuity.id_gaps: gaps exist in EXP numbering (52, 300-310, 317-323, etc.) but these are known/pre-existing from prior bulk operations and tracked under ISS-2105/EXP-425
expansion_tracker_continuity.details: Tracker healthy. next_id=431 > max_id=430 (no collision risk). All EXP-NNN.json files have tracker entries. 45 archive entries have non-EXP IDs (baby-orphan-ISS-NNNN format) — these are not real EXP gaps. EXP-425 stale pending (7 days) is already tracked under ISS-2175.

coupled_category_queue.details: 0 section-new/category-proposal-writeup items in live tracker — nothing to couple.

workspace_sync_skips.details: 200 mtime-guard skips in 24h (normal — decider committed these files directly to git, making workspace copies stale). No direction-violation skips. All 200 are expected workspace-sync normal operation.

curmudgeon_digest_coverage.details: 4 unprocessed reviews, all dated 2026-05-24 (yesterday) — normal pipeline lag awaiting next decider run. No broken review files. Digest regenerated fresh before reading.

workspace_only_files.details: Workspace and git are in sync: 604 curmudgeon reviews, 522 analyst expansion files tracked identically in both.

drift_audit.details: Drift audit is fresh (19.5h, threshold 72h). 11 drift candidates queued for curmudgeon: 7 large-rewrite (WIN-019, WIN-013, WIN-009, WIN-067, WIN-020, plus 2 more), 4 tldr-only. No verdict changes. 27 items on pre-TLDR schema still need upgrade reviews.

build_reproducibility.details: Build output differs only in the BUILD_DATE stamp (May 24 → May 25, 2026) — this is by design (new Date() in generate-html.js). No content drift. 1 line changed, 2 insertions/deletions total.

issues_found.description: www.chime-frb.ca returns HTTP 500 on both attempts. This is a data-source URL cited in our prose (CHIME fast radio burst telescope). May be a transient server error or site outage.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Monitor on next run. If persists 2+ runs, either update to working URL or add inline note that CHIME-FRB data is accessible via the catalog API at https://www.chime-frb.ca/catalog.

issues_found.description: EXP-425 (integrity_finding, assigned to tinker) has been pending 7 days since 2026-05-18. Covers ISS-2105: audit of expansion-tracker gap ranges. Tinker has not yet processed.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Tinker should pick up ISS-2105/EXP-425 on next run. The expansion-tracker ID gaps are not causing any data loss (orphan check passed, next_id is safe) but the audit is outstanding.

summary: Site is structurally healthy. test.js passes 3692 checks with 0 failures, covering all internal anchors, tab structure, data-prose consistency, and schema validation. Build output matches source data (the only diff is the automated build date stamp advancing to May 25, which is by design). All major data-source external links are reachable — 17/18 OK; the exception is www.chime-frb.ca (HTTP 500 on two attempts), which is a new moderate finding with no existing ISS. Discoverability infrastructure (llms.txt, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, meta tags, ClaimReview JSON-LD) is fully intact. Expansion tracker is healthy: next_id=431 > max_id=430, live-archive are disjoint, no orphaned files. The 4 unprocessed curmudgeon reviews (PRED-073, WIN-009, WIN-013, WIN-019) are all from 2026-05-24 — normal pipeline lag. Drift audit has 11 candidates queued for curmudgeon (7 large-rewrite, 4 tldr-only, 0 verdict changes). The stale EXP-425 pending item (7 days, tinker backlog) is already tracked under ISS-2175. Overall: one new moderate finding (chime-frb.ca 500) plus one already-tracked moderate (EXP-425/ISS-2175).
